ekaṁ disaṁ pharitvā.meaning: having suffused one direction; having pervaded one quarter (with mettā etc.)
ekaṁ disaṁ pharitvā.gram: phrase; accusative numeral + accusative noun + gerund
breakdown: Having suffused, filled, permeated (gerund of pharati).
ekaṁ disaṁ pharitvā.goenka: This phrase comes from the formula for radiating mettā: the meditator dwells having suffused first one direction, then the second, third and fourth, above, below and all around, with a mind filled with mettā — boundless goodwill pervading all beings in every quarter.

ekaṁsabyākaraṇīyo.meaning: to be answered categorically; (a question) that should be given a one-sided, definite explanation
ekaṁsabyākaraṇīyo.gram: compound adjective (potential participle), masculine nominative singular
breakdown: One-sided, categorical, definite (eka, one + aṁsa, side).
To be explained, to be answered (potential participle of byākaroti).

ekindriyaṁ jīvaṁ.meaning: life having only one sense faculty
ekindriyaṁ jīvaṁ.gram: phrase; compound adjective + neuter noun, accusative singular
ekindriyaṁ jīvaṁ.goenka: The phrase describes life that has only one sense faculty, namely the outward form (kāya) — used in the texts of plant life, regarded as possessing the body-faculty alone.

ekodakāassa.gram: phrase: compound adjective + 3rd person singular optative of atthi

ekodibhāvaṁ.meaning: the establishing of oneness of mind; unification, one-pointedness
ekodibhāvaṁ.gram: masculine abstract compound noun, accusative singular
breakdown: Unified, brought to oneness (from eka, one).
State, becoming (accusative): the state of unification.

ekāhaṁ.meaning: one day; for a single day

esohamasmi.summary: One of the three modes of misidentification (etaṁ mama, esohamasmi, eso me attā): this is mine, this am I, this is my self.
esohamasmi.gram: sandhi fusion: pronoun + pronoun + verb, 1st person singular present
breakdown: Am (1st person singular of atthi); -ṁ > -m- before a vowel.

esāhaṁ.meaning: this I; I, this very one
esāhaṁ.gram: sandhi fusion: demonstrative pronoun + 1st person pronoun

esānisaṁso.meaning: this is the benefit; this blessing, this advantage
esānisaṁso.gram: sandhi fusion: demonstrative pronoun + masculine noun, nominative singular
breakdown: Benefit, result, blessing. Sandhi: esa + ānisaṁso > esānisaṁso.

etadagga.meaning: foremost; pre-eminent; the highest of these
breakdown: Top, summit: the topmost of this (class), foremost.

etadavoca.gram: pronoun + verb, 3rd person singular aorist of vacati

etamatthaṁ.meaning: this meaning; this matter, this goal
etamatthaṁ.gram: sandhi fusion: pronoun + masculine noun, accusative singular

ettha.gram: indeclinable adverb, from the pronoun stem ima

etthāvacarā.meaning: the spheres therein; the realms moving in this
etthāvacarā.gram: adverb + masculine noun, plural, fused by sandhi
breakdown: Spheres, realms; moving in. Sandhi: ettha + avacarā > etthāvacarā.

ettāvatā.meaning: to that extent; in so far

ettāvatāpi.meaning: even to that extent; in this way too
breakdown: Also, even. Sandhi: ettāvatā + api > ettāvatāpi.
Looking like, of the kind of (√dis): such as this.
Just, only (emphatic). Sandhi: etāni + eva > etāneva.

evameva.meaning: just so; in just the same way

evamādi.meaning: and so on; beginning like this, et cetera
breakdown: Thus, like this; -ṁ > -m- before a vowel.
Beginning with: things of this sort and so on.

evamādīnañca.meaning: and of such things; and of these and the like
evamādīnañca.gram: compound adjective, genitive plural + particle ca
breakdown: Of those beginning with (genitive plural of ādi); -ṁ > -ñ- before ca.

evarūpehi.meaning: with such; among those of such a form
breakdown: Form, kind (instrumental/ablative plural): with those of such kind.

eḷakasaṁvāsaññeva.gram: masculine compound noun, accusative singular + emphatic particle, fused by sandhi

gabbhaseyyaṁ.meaning: lying in the womb; rebirth in a womb
breakdown: Lying down, bed (accusative): the lying in a womb, conception.
Root meaning to go (present stem gaccha-).
gacchati.goenka: Gacchati is found in the well-known refuge formula: Buddhaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi — literally, "to the surrender of the Buddha I go", I go to the Buddha as refuge.

gadattāpi.meaning: and because of the fact of speaking
breakdown: The fact of speaking (gada + abstract suffix -tta).
Also, and. Sandhi: gadattā + api > gadattāpi.

gahapatimahāsālakule.meaning: in a householder family of great means; in a wealthy householder clan
breakdown: Householder, master of the house (gaha, house + pati, master).
Of great halls, very wealthy (mahā, great + sāla, hall).

gahaṭṭhavattaṁ.meaning: the practice of a layperson; the duty of householders
breakdown: Layperson; literally one standing in the house (gaha + ṭha, standing).
Practice, duty, observance (past participle of vattati).

gahaṭṭhena.meaning: by a householder; with a layperson
breakdown: Standing (√ṭhā): one standing in the house, a householder.
Stem of gaṇhāti, to take, seize (√gah).

gahitāni.gram: past participle of gaṇhāti, neuter plural
gahitāni.note: uncertain: expected spelling gahitāni; the source shows gahitani.

breakdown: Action noun suffix: the act of going.

gamanāya.meaning: for going; for the manner of going
gamanāya.gram: neuter action noun, dative singular, from gacchati (√gam)
breakdown: Dative singular ending: for the sake of.

gamanīya.meaning: that ought to be gone to; bound to go
gamanīya.gram: potential participle of gacchati (√gam), in compounds
breakdown: Potential participle suffix: that should be.

gambhīranipuṇaduddasaduranubodhasukhumad.meaning: the state of being deep, subtle, hard to see, hard to understand, fine and hard to penetrate (said of the Dhamma)
gambhīranipuṇaduddasaduranubodhasukhumad.gram: long compound abstract noun, accusative singular
breakdown: Abstract suffix -tā in the accusative: the state of being so.
Wisdom (paññā); instrumental: by the one possessing deep wisdom.

gameti.gram: verb, 3rd person singular present, causative of gacchati (√gam)
breakdown: Causative stem of √gam: to make go.

gamika.meaning: one setting out on a journey; one who goes away
breakdown: Agent suffix: one connected with going, a traveller.

gamma.meaning: belonging to the village; low, vulgar, inferior
breakdown: Adjective suffix: gāma + ya > gamma, villagish, common.

gammo.gram: adjective, masculine nominative singular, from gāma
breakdown: Adjective suffix: gāma + ya > gamma; nominative singular -o.
Noun-forming element: that which is smelled.
